implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Coach independently executes test files written by testing tasks
Test failures produce actionable Coach feedback
Tasks that only create test infrastructure don't false-fail
Unit test verifies the updated profile

completion_promises.evidence: Updated DEFAULT_PROFILES[TaskType.TESTING] in guardkit/models/task_types.py to set tests_required=True. Also updated zero_test_blocking=False.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Coach independently executes test files written by testing tasks
completion_promises.evidence: CoachValidator.run_independent_tests() is generic and already handles all task types. With tests_required=True, the Coach's validate() method will invoke run_independent_tests for TESTING tasks. The Coach detects test commands via _detect_test_command() and runs pytest against collected test files.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Test failures produce actionable Coach feedback
completion_promises.evidence: CoachValidator.run_independent_tests() returns IndependentTestResult with tests_passed, test_command, test_output_summary, and raw_output. The validate() method uses these results to produce feedback rather than approval when tests fail. The Coach's failure classification logic in _summarize_test_output provides actionable details.

completion_promises.criterion_text: `zero_test_blocking` remains False (don't block if no test runner available)
completion_promises.evidence: Set zero_test_blocking=False in the TESTING profile. When tests_required=True but zero_test_blocking=False, the task is not blocked if no tests are found (zero-test anomaly produces a warning, not an error).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Tasks that only create test infrastructure (conftest.py) don't false-fail
completion_promises.evidence: zero_test_blocking=False ensures that tasks creating only test infrastructure (conftest.py, fixtures) won't fail due to zero test files. The Coach's _detect_test_command() also handles cases where no matching tests are found by returning None and skipping verification gracefully.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit test verifies the updated profile
completion_promises.evidence: Updated 5 existing tests in tests/unit/test_task_types.py to verify the new TESTING profile: test_create_testing_profile, test_for_type_returns_testing_profile, test_default_profiles_testing_configuration, test_get_profile_with_testing, test_workflow_testing_task. All 123 tests pass.
